title: French Shrimp Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make French-inspired shrimp wrap recipe. The crunchy shrimp and buttery wrap come together in perfect harmony.
instructions: Heat buttery in a pan over medium heat.
Add shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing the cooked shrimp in the center and topping with crunchy.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
